assertions.title: /admin/reportes page loads without error

evidence.network: Page loaded but threw runtime error: 'Title is not defined'

assertions.issues: The /admin/reportes page throws a runtime JavaScript error: 'Title is not defined'. The page only shows an error overlay with the message 'Something went wrong! Title is not defined'. This indicates a bug in the Reportes page component where a variable named 'Title' is referenced but not defined.

summary: Tested /admin/reportes page: login succeeded, navigation to reportes succeeded, but the page throws a runtime error 'Title is not defined' and shows an error overlay instead of the expected bookings table. No bookings are visible.
